market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Professional investors dumped 52K BTC worth of ETFs in Q1, filings show
articles.description: US spot Bitcoin ETF ownership shifted during the market downturn as hedge funds exited positions, while banks and long-term allocators continued building exposure.

articles.title: Crypto Clarity Act in spotlight for bad-actor provisions as Senate process grinds forward
articles.description: The industry has been trying to make a case this week the Clarity Act provides law enforcement strong tools to combat illicit finance involving cryptocurrency.

articles.title: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
articles.description: Meta may have one found one way to slash its massive data center bill: tents.

articles.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
articles.description: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

articles.title: Helion, the Sam Altman-backed fusion startup, raises $465M to build a power plant for Microsoft
articles.description: Fusion startup Helion is racing to complete a power plant for Microsoft by 2028. A fresh infusion of cash should help with that.

articles.title: Coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer
articles.description: A Coinbase-Better Home & Finance initiative will allow qualified borrowers to use Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for home loan down payments.

articles.title: OCC chief says Democrats applying sole political pressure in World Liberty charter choice
articles.description: The regulator rejected claims he's doing President Trump's bidding during a congressional hearing that also addressed the GENIUS Act stablecoin push.

articles.title: 'Dr. Doom'-backed Atlas Capital CEO says bitcoin could crash 70% before reaching $500,000
articles.description: Backed by economist Nouriel Roubini, a long-time anti-bitcoin advocate, and known as 'Dr. Doom,' the Atlas CEO, Reza Bundy, shot a short-term warning for bitcoin but stayed bullish in the long-term.

articles.title: Bitcoin bulls' fate rests on $60K support as crypto erases $2T in market cap
articles.description: Bitcoin continued "incredible" 2022 bear market repeat behavior as sellers kept control over BTC price rebound attempts.

articles.title: Bybit joins Western Union’s new USDPT network as stablecoin expands distribution
articles.description: The exchange integration gives Western Union’s dollar-pegged token access to crypto market liquidity as payment providers accelerate their adoption of stablecoins.

articles.title: Meta’s Oversight Board says account bans lack due process, transparency
articles.description: Meta's board cites "due process" concerns over account bans. It's also pushing Meta to offer clear information about violations and its use in AI in making its determinations.

articles.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
articles.description: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

articles.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
articles.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.
